cause_analysis.narrative: Luxe Eyebrows churned on 2026-02-18 after 284 days with Zoca. Conversation collapsed into a 21-day silence starting 2025-12-19. Classification: reactive fade — Zoca reached out 19 times, but the client only replied 5. A one-sided monologue in the weeks before churn.
recommendations: [Engagement] One-way outreach is a warning, not a save. Cap outreach at 5 attempts if no reply, then switch to a different channel or a different messenger (SP → AM → team lead) to break the pattern.
